title: Everything Mod
description: This mod is about returning every removed or unused thing from Minecraft into its best place in the game. The mod includes the whole Bulgaria in it, though!!!
body:
# **Everything Mod 2 (Official Trailer):**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YJ3lwv0xyLQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Everything Mod OST - Railway:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1CxtjRxnHTQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

===============================================================================
# **The Mod Adds 3 New Categories:**

### Bulgaria:

- New music discs (32)
- New paintings (18)
- New trading system - Using the bulgarian block
- New structure: The revivalist's house
- New flowers: The Edelweiss and the bulgarian rose

### Everything Else:

- New music discs (3)
- New blocks (20+)
- New flowers (2)
- New tools
- New mechanics (???)
- Added Ciphers (09/11)

### Culinary:
- New items(3)

**_What are you waiting for? Download it now!_**

**_Caution! - You have to use Geckolib to use the mod properly!_**




## _**DO NOT CLICK ON THIS VIDEO!!!**_
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YNv6V5ZETe4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
